

 
## *************particleSwarm-volume-mean: resultFilemultiple1*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300],[1000, 1000, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.36063568377739064
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([124.78058648782405, -181.08099958867942, -79.72129572467722, 156.0399500181402, 232.8744588082863, -17.192014974038734, 589.7853152170136, 388.2404146678534, -56.93347376109686, 143.9142177624567, -206.90290105515035, 113.40068593979092, 577.4536681260627, -180.61743648345563, -88.1938364614846, 705.903577926977, 274.4868209123618, -88.27393494328093, 293.3610621400141, 43.26509024815296, 16.77600327811931, 601.8391578124679, -167.8986733745356, 127.55318647519901, 222.92879971044476, 168.26870574720164, 103.44181872861039, 496.2062192710227, -221.24169656721887, -1.6462376620195427, 479.228707237124, -430.1168965423694, -163.8131634942254, 222.0189720671117, -22.51538542819551, 172.30011565147035, 267.2380024390919, 114.44370340335173, -26.52501247767031, 315.5197323899528, -125.08783448896578, -66.41507350126827, 76.50071943084156, 21.84706215983325, 15.286660830225275, 88.43292917920198, 133.24254002297317, 181.13550114948578, 311.3434948620656, -179.0913053264215, 110.47286883725583, 159.5353909237636, -6.663914964891082, -178.5450090933309, 609.7558276099934, 346.19447968760824, 28.58350201147605, 459.82147802784624, 232.9657333299586, 39.27177805708423])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 16.34 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume-mean: resultFilemultiple1*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300],[1000, 1000, 300]])
optimization_options = {'learning_rate': 1, 'max_steps': 10000, 'ftol': 0.0001, 'tolerance_steps': 200}
Energy = 0.24545598571689975
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([144.82498568579092, -68.20433212445892, -127.56458697803427, 291.1457456133187, 235.99319829665694, 0.0012485447351987412, 591.3948170859444, 385.7369477749417, 0.00010612257818520427, 216.76999080612157, -247.16412334051466, -0.009072606918171897, 657.0644744083828, -299.0407949972992, -0.024983669853092753, 609.115316122775, 321.0392392367737, -40.1233362006308, 308.55336002429186, 29.543573975668696, -0.004563302407982551, 599.3049877498864, -327.3305787750328, 110.21325352820531, 312.37157739704685, 157.94357539917303, 99.93340780986023, 598.6043790223792, -370.88138290575574, 0.020808854405571325, 599.2617153072139, -327.47422556502954, -110.1114042799083, 144.8237551702082, -68.21816630821996, 127.55640977834982, 312.36844268399034, 157.94324333223315, -99.93659381981519, 294.7166031855685, -140.82213197507613, -106.34639117921044, 170.35513032649132, 54.5169587272495, 0.005976159007366094, 149.7327968779624, 59.815308018298815, 127.9913876729817, 294.7059954439645, -140.80649426743574, 106.32919274217218, 149.73341881012888, 59.82009142205663, -127.98990411292833, 609.1166213676008, 321.03708548566306, 40.11912548117138, 485.43526861491387, 282.0934892793911, -0.0006148215414465495])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 0.82 minutes
